meta.method: Offline reconstruction of the prism_bootstrap payload from origin/main snapshots through the server's own compiled dist/ code, mirroring src/tools/bootstrap.ts:1358-1400 assembly and :1419-1465 measurement. Same method as s167-server-audit.md:683-705.
meta.window_divisor_note: Live percent (20.7% at 41,368 tok) implies a 200,000-token divisor — matches the production env override documented in brief-449 Change 4.5; code default is 500K (src/config.ts:69-70). No env value was read.
meta.prefetch_scenario: S202-like: opening message containing a glossary keyword + next_steps keyword matches (glossary.md, task-queue.md) + always-prefetched pending-doc-updates.md
